title: Kenyan-Style Chicken Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken bake recipe inspired by Kenyan cuisine, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of rich spices and tender chicken will leave you wanting more.

instructions.step: Season the chicken with salt, black pepper, and Kenyan curry powder.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the onion, tomato, and garlic. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Pour the coconut milk mixture over the chicken in the baking dish.
Add the uncooked rice to the baking dish, making sure it's covered with the coconut milk mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25-30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the rice is tender.
